tender.description: Fabrication and erection of Mechanical Anti- Collision Safety Tailgate in 52 Machines (48 Nos CAT-777E- 100 te dumpers, 03 Nos CAT-777D-100 Te converted water sprinklers and 01 Nos CAT777D-100 Te Dumper ) at Jayant Project , NCL.
